productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Pink Polo Tshirts
description: Fuschia pink and white striped polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has a ribbed collar with printed lettering below it, ribbed sleeve hems, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, buttoned chest placket, embroidered brand name on the left chest, appliqued brand tab on the left hem and vented hems
